# Wikilinks

Use wikilinks for internal vault links.

## Common forms

- `[[Note]]`
- `[[Note|Display Text]]`
- `[[Note#Heading]]`
- `[[#Heading in same note]]`

## Guidance

- prefer canonical note names or stable slugs
- use aliases only when the display text matters for readability
- use heading links when you need a precise section target
- do not use markdown links for internal vault notes unless there is a specific reason
